questionHtml:
A beam of X-rays of wavelength 100.00 pm is scattered from a block of carbon. Radiation is observed at right angles to the incident beam.

What is the Compton shift for the observed radiation?


A.  0.1024 pm

B.  2.4322 pm

C.  2.4322 nm

D.  0.1024 nm
